nr_band.description: NR band number. Default depends on ORS model, please refer to the connection parameters

dl_nr_arfcn.title: Expert: DL NR ARFCN
dl_nr_arfcn.description: Can be used instead of DL Frequency to directly set the Downlink NR Absolute Radio Frequency Channel Number of the cell (Do not set both DL Frequency and DL NR ARFCN)

pci.description: Physical Cell ID. Range 0 to 1007. Equal to ORS Serial number modulo 1008 by default
Physical Cell ID. Range 0 to 1007. Equal to (ORS Serial number + 504) modulo 1008 by default

root_sequence_index.description: Range: 0 to 137. Equal to (ORS serial number + 79) modulo 138 by default. Sets prach-RootSequenceIndex parameter. It must be different for each neighbour cell operating on the same frequency and sharing the same PRACH configuration.

Range: 0 to 137. Equal to ORS serial number modulo 138 by default. Sets prach-RootSequenceIndex parameter. It must be different for each neighbour cell operating on the same frequency and sharing the same PRACH configuration.
